name: Bunker Golf
about: Bunker Golf is an indoor golf venue located in Newnan, Georgia, featuring two private bays equipped with Trackman iO launch monitors. The facility allows golfers to practice their swing or play on iconic courses such as Pebble Beach and Pinehurst No. 2. The venue positions itself as a community-focused space where golfers can work on their game, socialize, and host events. It also offers membership options and merchandise for purchase. The atmosphere is described as a modern, casual environment for both serious practice and social gatherings.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman iO technology for accurate swing and shot data
Private bays for a focused and uninterrupted golf experience
Social atmosphere with space for events and league nights
Location in Newnan making it accessible for local golfers
Variety of activities including practice, playing famous courses, and social events

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service or kitchen facilities
No mention of a bar or alcohol service

simulator_hardware.notes: 2 indoor simulators with Trackman iO launch monitors in private bays

faq.answer: The website does not mention a BYOB policy or food service, so it is best to check with the venue directly.

faq.answer: The website does not provide specific information on the time required for 18 holes, so this would depend on the simulator software and player pace.
